name: User Base
description: The number of active users on the platform, indicating its popularity and potential reach.

name: Monetization Options
description: Availability of features that allow content creators to earn revenue, such as ads, subscriptions, or virtual gifts.

name: Platform Compatibility
description: The range of devices and operating systems supported by the app, affecting accessibility for both streamers and viewers.

name: Content Focus
description: The primary type of content the platform is known for, such as gaming, lifestyle, or professional events.
sources: Platform official descriptions, user-generated content analysis

description: Tools available for audience engagement, like live chat, polls, or Q&A sessions.

name: Platform Compatibility
description: The range of devices and operating systems the app supports, including mobile (iOS, Android), desktop (Windows, macOS), and web browsers.

name: Monetization Options

name: Audience Engagement Tools

name: Streaming Quality
description: The maximum supported video resolution and frame rate, indicating the quality of live streams.

description: Ability to stream simultaneously to multiple platforms or integrate with social media for broader reach.

description: Pricing structure, including availability of free tiers, subscription plans, and any additional fees.

description: Availability of detailed analytics and performance metrics to help creators understand their audience and improve content.

description: Extent to which users can personalize their streaming experience with overlays, themes, and branding elements.

description: The range of devices and operating systems on which the app is accessible.
